problem: What is the actual neurobiological mechanism of depression — serotonin alone is insufficient
hypothesis: The key to What is the actual neurobiological mechanism of depression — serotonin alone is insufficient is Sleep-dependent memory consolidation in hippocampus — specifically Sleep-dependent memory consolidation — which would help 280,000,000 people affected.
